calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-03-2012 Vacated

Ntc Of Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Enter Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-29-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Gregory M. Shefer, Esq., Chanler Group, Tel. 415.388.0911, for plaintiff and moving party;
Bryan McCoy, Esq. of Fulbright & Jaworski, Tel. 213.892.9307, for defendant Carrini, via court call.

The matter was discussed. After hearing, PLAINTIFF RUSSELL BRIMER's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Enter Judgment is taken under submission. Moving party to submit a proposed order and a proposed judgment. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077
